text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Egg protein supplementation improved upper body muscle strength and protein intake in community-dwelling older adult females who attended congregate meal sites or adult learning centers.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Egg protein supplementation improved upper body muscle strength and protein intake in community-dwelling older adult females who attended congregate meal sites or adult learning centers: A pilot randomized controlled trial.","entailment":"The title of the study explicitly reports that egg protein supplementation led to improvements in upper body muscle strength and protein intake among the specified population, indicating an observed effect.","population":"community-dwelling older adult females who attended congregate meal sites or adult learning centers","intervention":"egg protein supplementation","comparator":"","outcome":"upper body muscle strength and protein intake","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"}]}
